message:
🌱 coredns: Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range (#1916)

* 🌱 Add coredns: Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add coredns: Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix coredns reverse zones mission: remove email formatting artifacts

Replace raw email quote resolution with clean technical summary.
Remove email formatting artifacts from step descriptions. The fix
ensures reverse zones are calculated for the full CIDR range, not
just the first IP.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "coredns-2779-reverse-zones-should-be-calculated-for-the-full-cidr-range",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "coredns: Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range",
+    "description": "Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify coredns troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your coredns deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review coredns configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns\n```\nWhen specifying a reverse DNS zone using CIDR notation the full range of zones are not calculated."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Reverse zones should be calculated for the full CIDR range",
+        "description": "CoreDNS was updated to properly calculate reverse zones for the full CIDR range. When specifying a reverse DNS zone using CIDR notation, all zones within the range are now generated correctly (e.g., 61.129.10.in-addr.arpa, 62.129.10.in-addr.arpa, 63.129.10.in-addr.arpa for a /22 block).\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Reverse zones should be calculated for the full\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "CoreDNS fixed the reverse zone calculation to properly handle the full CIDR range. Previously, reverse zones were only generated for the first IP in a CIDR block. The fix ensures that all IPs within the CIDR range are covered by the generated reverse zone entries.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "coredns",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "coredns"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns/issues/2779",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with coredns installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:31:11.270Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
